---
title: "0 General"
format: gfm
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
message: true
warning: true
echo: true
output: true
toc: true
---

# General To Do

-   Write down equations to get to derived variables

-   Write M&M

    -   bullet points for lab

    -   complete field & greenhouse

    -   run after Morgan

-   Finish DMP first draft

    -   send to Fabienne.

    -   When feedback –\> Morgan & co?

# Detailed To Do

## 1. mineral N pools

! 2 different types: t1 and t2: txt files from spectro. t3: xlsx file.

-   adapt import pipeline, including loop

-   export data table with raw data

## 2. PMN
